title: Dominance calculator module with 80% threshold + 10 min tx
task: Create src/HistoryAnalysisService.js with analyzeAccountHistory(transactions) method. Filter transactions with category_id set. Return { dominantCategory, dominance, confidence, categorizedCount, categoryCounts } when dominance >= threshold (default 0.80) and categorizedCount >= minTransactionCount (default 10). Return { insufficientData: true } or { belowThreshold: true } otherwise. Support optional data/dominance-config.json for configurable threshold.
acceptance: analyzeAccountHistory() filters transactions with non-null category_id
Returns { dominantCategory: null, insufficientData: true } when categorized < 10 (default)
Returns { dominantCategory, belowThreshold: true } when dominance < 0.80 (default)
Returns { dominantCategory, dominance, confidence: dominance, categorizedCount, categoryCounts } when threshold met
Tie-breaking: first encountered category wins (document behavior)
